candidate.completion: put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clean and legible: loneliness seeks company, then reframes company as a mechanism for being neglected more efficiently. "Ignored at scale" is the sharpest move and gives the line real lift, though the route there is a little longer than the best aphoristic forms.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop asking me to verify I'm human and start proving someone else is.
